chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-159 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on CMA 4682/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For For hearing of main case 4.For hearing of CMA 710/25 04-09-2025 Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner submits that his client has taken away his file and is not in contact with him. Since none appeared on behalf of the petitioner, this petition along with listed applications is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
